title: Parameria laevigata
taxonomy: Parameria laevigata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Parameria, which is a part of the Rubiaceae family. The species is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. Within the Rubiaceae family, Parameria laevigata is part of the tribe Rubieae. The classification is based on the plant's morphological and anatomical characteristics.
